verdict.explanation: The query plan exists, but there is not enough executed evidence yet to support a real directional verdict.

llmSummary.oneSentence: INCONCLUSIVE (low) on thesis: Smart money is accumulating HYPE
llmSummary.analystTake: The query plan exists, but there is not enough executed evidence yet to support a real directional verdict.

plannedQueries.label: Resolve entity and search context
plannedQueries.rationale: Confirm the entity and collect the first contextual anchors.

plannedQueries.label: Get token info
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token info --chain solana --token HYPE
plannedQueries.rationale: Establish the token identity, contract, and basic metadata.

plannedQueries.label: Inspect token indicators
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token indicators --chain solana --token HYPE
plannedQueries.rationale: Pull high-level market and risk indicators that could support or weaken the thesis.

plannedQueries.label: 7-day token flows
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token flows --chain solana --token HYPE --days 7
plannedQueries.rationale: Check short-term net flow pressure and direction.

plannedQueries.label: 30-day token flows
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token flows --chain solana --token HYPE --days 30
plannedQueries.rationale: Compare short-term thesis to medium-term capital movement.

plannedQueries.label: Flow intelligence
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token flow-intelligence --chain solana --token HYPE --days 7
plannedQueries.rationale: Identify the quality and character of capital flows.

plannedQueries.label: Holder distribution
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token holders --chain solana --token HYPE
plannedQueries.rationale: Check concentration and holder quality risk.

plannedQueries.label: Who bought and sold recently
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token who-bought-sold --chain solana --token HYPE --days 7
plannedQueries.rationale: Identify directional participants and opposing evidence.

plannedQueries.label: PnL snapshot
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token pnl --chain solana --token HYPE --days 30
plannedQueries.rationale: See whether current positioning looks healthy or crowded.

plannedQueries.label: OHLCV context
plannedQueries.command: nansen research token ohlcv --chain solana --token HYPE --timeframe 1h
plannedQueries.rationale: Add price-action context to the evidence set.

nextQuestions: Which executed query produced the strongest contradictory signal?
Should we spend more credits on profiler follow-ups or stop here?
